    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PatientDto>
    PatientController.createPatient(@Valid PatientDto patientDto)
    Creates a new patient in the system.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<PatientDto>>

    Retrieves all patients from the database.

    Retrieves a paginated list of all patients with sorting capabilities.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PatientDto>
    PatientController.getPatient(int id)
    Retrieves a patient by their unique identifier.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PatientDto>
    PatientController.updatePatient(int id, @Valid PatientDto patientDto)
    Updates an existing patient with the provided information.
